description_long: This object is a stylized pumpkin with a smooth, rounded body and a prominent green stem on top. The front features a classic jack-o'-lantern face with two triangular eyes and a wide, toothy mouth, all rendered in black. The pumpkin's surface is matte orange with subtle dimples and grooves, giving it a cartoonish, playful appearance. The green stem is thick and slightly twisted, with painted-on leaf details extending onto the pumpkin's top. There are no visible openings or separations, suggesting it is a solid decorative item. The overall look is festive and suitable for Halloween or autumn-themed urban displays.
description: A cartoonish orange pumpkin with a green stem and a black jack-o'-lantern face, featuring a smooth, matte surface and playful details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes and a wide, toothy mouth, as well as the green stem and leaf details.
description_view_1: Rear view with no facial features, displaying the smooth orange surface and the green stem with leaf patterns.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the rounded body, absence of facial features, and the continuation of the green stem and leaf design.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the transition between the front face and the plain back, with the stem and leaf details visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with two black triangular eyes and a wide, asymmetrical mouth with a single tooth, rendered in a simple, geometric style.
